title: Slim Fit T-Shirt
bodyHtml:
FIT : Slim

The Modern Fit Cuts closer to the body, defining your body silhouette. Slims down through the chest and shoulder offering a clean neat look


Composition & Care

  • 50% Cotton 50% Viscose
  • Machine wash up to 30C/86F, gentle cycle
  • Do not bleach
  • Iron up to 110C/230F
  • Do not iron directly on prints/embroidery/embellishments
  • Do not dry clean
  • Do not tumble dry

title: Skater Fit Jeans
bodyHtml:
FIT : Skater

Skater fit jeans refer to a type of jeans that are relaxed,loose fit around the hips and thighs & tapers down to a straight leg opening inspired by the style often seen in skater culture


Composition & Care

  • 100% Cotton
  • Machine wash up to 30C/86F, gentle cycle
  • Do not bleach
  • Iron up to 110C/230F
  • Do not iron directly on prints/embroidery/embellishments
  • Do not dry clean
  • Do not tumble dry

title: Garden Noir
bodyHtml:
Top Notes:  Aqueous, Bergamot, Cardamom

Middle Notes: Lavender, Orris, White Flower

Base Notes:  Cashmere, Cedarwood, Musk

 

Ingredients:

Alcohol Denat, Fragrance (Parfum), Water (Aqua), Camphor, Citral, Citronellol, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Coumarin, Geraniol, Lavandula Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil, Pinene, Rose Ketones, Vanillin

 

Usage: Apply perfume to the pulse points of the wrists and neck.

 

Quantity:

100ml 3.4fl.Oz.
